item.title: 1X - Eve
item.description:
TL;DR

  • 1X EVE is a wheeled android robot designed by 1X Technologies for logistics, retail, and industrial environments
  • Built with soft, organic-inspired mechanics to enable safe physical interaction with humans
  • Can navigate real-world environments independently - doors, elevators, and standard workspaces
  • Understands and responds to natural language commands via advanced language processing
  • Learns and adapts over time through embodied AI, rather than following fixed pre-programmed routines

Overview

1X EVE is an android worker designed by 1X Technologies. It’s a mobile robot with wheels and gripper arms that can be used for various tasks in logistics, retail, and other industries.
